---
title: "Rapport Planet"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
planet = read_xlsx("PlanetDataSet.xlsx", sheet = "nasa_exoplanet_intelligence")

vide = apply(planet, MARGIN = 1, function(x){sum(is.na(x))})
sup = c()

for (i in 1:6150){
  if (vide[i]>=1){
    sup=c(sup,i)
  }
}

planet=planet[-sup,]
```
